title: Rename CTA button to 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' with new invite link

requirements.text: In AppPreviewSection.tsx, update the 'Become Poppo Agent' CTA button/anchor element (located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[4]/div[4]/div[3]/button[1]) to display the label 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖' and set its href to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D' (opening in a new tab).
acceptanceCriteria: The button in the AppPreviewSection displays the text 'Join 55028198 LHT 💖'.
Clicking the button navigates to 'https://invite-vone.com/Q8QN2D' in a new tab.
No other buttons or links on the page are modified.

constraints: Only modify the specific button identified by the XPath in AppPreviewSection — do not change any other CTA buttons or links.
nonGoals: Changing Navbar links or WhatsApp buttons.
